title: Inspect playbook idempotency
description: Report which tasks report changed on a second run to locate non-idempotent steps.
body: Use when verifying a playbook converges. Actions: run the play twice in a safe environment and report the per-task changed status on the second run, naming any task that is still changed and whether it uses a raw command. Do not declare a playbook idempotent from a single run. This skill is read-only with respect to your code and exposes capability only; it must not run against production inventory without runtime permission. Validation signals include a second-run summary with zero changed, or a named list of offenders. Risk boundary: running even a check against prod hosts requires a human gate.
